title: Value flow
steps: Input value enters the program
A variable or collection stores the value
An expression transforms it
The result is printed, returned or saved

title: Relation flow
steps: Identify the source table and source grain
Filter or join source rows
Aggregate or calculate when required
Confirm the result grain and controls

title: Browser interaction flow
steps: HTML defines meaningful structure
CSS controls layout and presentation
A user event occurs
JavaScript updates state and renders feedback

title: Object responsibility flow
steps: A class defines state and behaviour
An object is created
A method receives input
The object updates state or returns a result

title: Collection anatomy
steps: List: ordered values accessed by position
Tuple: ordered values treated as fixed
Dictionary or map: keys point to values
Set: only unique values remain

title: Dataframe anatomy
steps: Columns describe attributes
Rows describe observations
A Boolean condition marks matching rows
The filter returns a new dataframe

title: Join matching
steps: Start with one row on the left
Find matching keys on the right
Combine matching columns
Check whether rows multiplied unexpectedly

title: DOM event path
steps: The browser creates a DOM tree
The user interacts with an element
The event travels through the tree
A handler updates state or the interface
